metadata.title:
CITIZENS ALLIANCE, A SECRET
ORGANIZATION FORMED FOR
PURPOSE OF DESTROYING
UNIONISM.

pages.raw_text:
WASHINGTON, Feb. 2O.-Reports
of activity on the part of the Parry
movement and the Citizens alliance
against labor unions reach the Amer
lean Federation of Labor headquarters
from various parts of the country.
They are not such as to cause alarm.


Peculiar conditions in Colorado have
served to give the Citizens alliance
temporarily, at least, strong standing
in that state, and present conditions
are not encouraging to organized labor.
In other parts of the country these
anti-union crusades have had no
serious effect.


A feature of the hostile anti-labor-
union movements, taken in connection
with their violent denuncation of the
boycott. is the. fact that these crusa-
